items.author: IEW Latest News @IEWLatestNews
items.content: Trump应伊朗政府请求，将能源设施摧毁期限暂停10天。Trump将最后期限延长至周二晚8点ET（美东时间）。Fox News周日电话采访中Trump表示他认为与伊朗的协议... Trump extended the deadline for Iran to comply to Tuesday at 8 p.m. ET.

items.author: Neese @DCurto7165
items.content: 回复 @SenatorSlotkin: He's bsing and trying to force them to make a deal. Trump is a coward and lashing out because Iran was refusing to accept his offer.

items.author: IEW Latest News @IEWLatestNews
items.content: Trump says we're blowing up the whole country if no Iran deal is reached in 48 hours — ABC News报道。Trump周日称：如果48小时内未达成和平协议，'we're blowing up the entire country'

items.author: Irfan Ahmad @Irfuu_
items.content: 回复 @seanhannity: The JCPOA Betrayal - Obama left him a WORKING nuclear deal with Iran. Trump scrapped it in 2018 for NO reason. 8 years later, war, dead civilians, billions spent. Now he wants credit for 'peace'? He broke it. He owns it.

items.author: Ryan ZL | Brokerage COO @ryangohzl
items.content: NFP beat 178K. Iran rejected the ceasefire plan. The IEA says April is worse than March. Gold is at $4,676. CPI Friday will decide Q2.

items.author: Bruce @BruceSwayin
items.content: 回复 @MarioNawfal: Then go tell Trump to accept Iran ceasefire demands.. Your logic made no sense

items.author: soyuz @deadtrots
items.content: 回复 @MarioNawfal: this is hilariously stupid to say as if the ceasefire conditions were of any benefit to Iran and not just subjugation to western powers

items.author: ZettaWire @ZettaWire
items.content: UPDATE: Ceasefire negotiations have stalled as Israel and the US prepare for the next phase of military operations. #Iran #Ceasefire

items.author: Mk Miss @MkMiss262
items.content: US-Iran ceasefire odds drop sharply amid escalating conflict over dollar control. Market confidence drops.

items.author: Danny Ng @DannyNg54838421
items.content: 回复 @MarioNawfal: Either you're naive or just delusional. Do you really think that if Iran accepts a ceasefire, the US and Israel won't attack and try to overthrow the Iranian regime again in the future — or even attempt to seize their oil?

items.author: The Kobeissi Letter @KobeissiLetter
items.content: Oil prices are now crossing above $115/barrel in the US. Our models indicate that if current levels are sustained another ~7 weeks, US CPI inflation will rise to ~3.7%. This would put US inflation at its highest level since September 2023.

items.author: The Kobeissi Letter @KobeissiLetter
items.content: BREAKING: US stock market futures fall at the open as President Trump declares Tuesday as 'Power Plant and Bridge Day' in Iran. S&P 500: -0.7% | Nasdaq 100: -0.8% | Dow Jones: -0.7% | WTI Crude: +3.0% | Natural Gas: +1.0% | Gold: -0.9%

items.author: The Kobeissi Letter @KobeissiLetter
items.content: BREAKING: US oil prices surge above $114/barrel as US market futures officially reopen after the 3-day weekend.
